title: excoecaria cochinchinensis
intro: Excoecaria cochinchinensis, also known as the 'Garcin', is a species of plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. It has been traditionally used in Southeast Asian medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Excoecaria cochinchinensis are attributed to its ability to treat various conditions such as fever, cough, and skin disorders, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In herbal preparations, Excoecaria cochinchinensis is often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
